title: Another
description:
Koichi Sakakibara transfers to Yomiyama North Middle School, where he becomes interested in a mysterious girl named Mei Misaki who is ignored by everyone around her. As strange deaths and terrifying accidents begin happening to students and their families, Koichi discovers that his class is connected to a dark curse that has haunted the school for years. Together with Mei, he tries to uncover the truth behind the mystery before more lives are lost.

As fear and paranoia spread among the classmates, the line between reality and horror slowly begins to blur. With each new tragedy bringing them closer to the terrifying secret hidden within Class 3-3, Koichi and Mei must confront the curse before it consumes everyone around them.
